calendar.matters:
Plaintiffs Request For Default Prove-Up And Court Judgment Agains Defendant Hedru Woldezgi
Off Calendar Jan-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Nelson C. Barry III, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Georgina Largaespada.
Witness Georgina Largaespada sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Hedru Woldezgi,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-100 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $261,484.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $0
Total Judgment in the amount of $261,484.00

Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reinstate Default Judgment Against Defendant Hedru Woldezgi

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. AGATHA IBARRA PANDAY, TEL. NO. 587-0550 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF GEORGINA LARGAESPADA'S Motion To Reinstate Default Judgment Against Defendant Hedru Woldezgi is GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
